sample_posts.text:
Kor Protocol Raises $7.5M at a $100M Valuation to Build the Creative Asset Clearinghouse
> Built on Base, KOR Protocol is building the creative asset clearinghouse for the AI Economy.
Source:
https://x.com/KorProtocol/status/2074527965946565015

tweet.text:
We've raised $7.5M at a $100M valuation to build the creative asset clearinghouse.

Capital provided by @1kxnetwork and @bcap, with continued support from existing investors @RepublicCrypto, @animocabrands, @alumniventures, @avax, @SevenXVentures, @Sfermion_, and @solana.

AI collapsed the cost of creating music, video, and media. What it hasn't solved is how talent gets discovered, matched to the right label or agency, and paid.

KOR is the clearinghouse that closes that gap, built on @base.
